section_e_mixed_canonicalization.test_expects: hello จิต → hello จิต
section_e_mixed_canonicalization.actual_behavior: hello จิต → hello-จิ-ต

findings.title: routingKey() API misuse in 007b test
findings.description: Test calls routingKey(string) but function expects Array<{role, content}>
findings.impact: Sections A/B/C of 007b test pass vacuously or incorrectly

findings.title: pickBackendByKey signature mismatch
findings.description: Test calls with 3 args (key, backends, preferBackend) but function takes 2
findings.impact: preferBackend parameter silently ignored in test and proxy
findings.fix: Add preferBackend support to pickBackendByKey signature OR document limitation

findings.title: status().backends missing innova_bot
findings.description: innova_bot in BACKEND_ORDER but not in status().backends dictionary
findings.impact: innova_bot routing works but health monitoring incomplete
